title: Add mobile hamburger navigation
description: Introduce a hamburger menu for narrow viewports to access site navigation items.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implementing mobile hamburger navigation for narrow viewports; ensuring links and GitHub entry are accessible in mobile menu and desktop menu remains unchanged.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added mobile hamburger navigation with lucide-react icons; desktop links unchanged, mobile menu renders links and GitHub. Tests not run (site build not executed).
